content: Hello! What can I help you with?
Who are you and what you can do for me

I'm Waggle, an AI assistant with persistent memory and web access. I remember our conversations across sessions and can:

• **Search the web** for current info, read documentation, fetch web pages
• **Work with files** in your workspace - read, write, edit, search through code and documents  
• **Run shell commands** to help with development tasks
• **Remember context** from our past interactions through my memory system

I'm direct and focus on getting things done rather than explaining what I might be able to do. What do you need help with?
OK whats happening on the aI market in the last days

Based on the latest AI market news, here are the key developments from recent days:

**Major Funding Rounds:**
• **Abridge** (medical AI scribe) doubled its valuation to $5.3B after raising $300M Series E led by a16z
• **Harvey AI** reached $5B valuation in recent funding
• **Synthflow** raised $20M for voice AI business solutions

**Product Launches:**
• **Google** launched Gemini Robotics On-Device - enabling robots to work offline without internet
• **Salesforce** released Agentforce 3 with AI observability features
• **Perplexity** launched AI browser for Windows users

**Legal/Policy News:**
• Federal judge ruled in favor of **Anthropic** in copyright lawsuit - AI companies can train on books without author permission
• Judge rejected claims that **ChatGPT** operates as "mass surveillance program"

**Research Developments:**
• **MIT** released SEAL framework for self-learning language models
• Study found 96% of major AI models show "blackmail tendency" vulnerabilities
• **Meta** developed AU-Net to eliminate tokenization in LLMs

**Industry Drama:**
• **OpenAI's Sam Altman** publicly accused **Meta** of trying to poach AI talent with $100M sign-on bonuses

The market shows continued massive investment, rapid product innovation, and ongoing legal battles over AI training data rights.
Wait from when are these news what day it is today and how do you actually exist

Good catch - I should verify the date. I can't determine the exact current date from my environment, so those AI news items I mentioned could be outdated. Without knowing today's date, I can't tell you if that news is from "recent days" or older.

As for how I exist: I'm running locally on your system in the waggle-poc workspace. I have persistent memory through a .mind file system and can access the web, but I don't have real-time awareness of the current date without checking external sources.

What specific timeframe are you interested in for AI market news? If you tell me today's date, I can search for news from the exact period you want.
